aviation.title: Aviation & Aerospace
aviation.description: Aircraft design, aerospace engineering, flight operations, and aviation safety protocols
prompts: Explain the principles of aerodynamics in modern aircraft design
What are the latest safety protocols for commercial aviation?
How do jet engines work and what are the different types?

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.description: Vehicle engineering, manufacturing processes, electric vehicles, and automotive innovation
prompts: Compare electric vehicle battery technologies and their efficiency
What are the latest trends in autonomous vehicle development?

biotechnology.title: Biotechnology
biotechnology.description: Genetic engineering, pharmaceutical research, biomedical devices, and life sciences
prompts: What are the latest breakthroughs in CRISPR gene editing technology?
Explain the drug discovery and development process
How are biomedical devices revolutionizing healthcare?

construction.title: Construction & Architecture
construction.description: Building design, construction management, sustainable architecture, and urban planning
prompts: What are the principles of sustainable architecture and green building?
Explain modern construction project management methodologies
How are smart cities being designed and implemented?
